_artifact.status_rationale: No human impression measurement session has been conducted. Fixture determinism is verified; comparator context is research-derived, not play-session derived. G8 requires QA impression ≥4/5 against a five-title panel — that evidence does not exist.

gate_definition.label: novelty / striking element
gate_definition.threshold: ≥1 element absent in ≤2 of ≥5 comparables AND QA impression ≥4/5
gate_definition.method: Audit the bounded seed-plan plus caption-first world handoff novelty claim against a five-title comparison ledger; run fixed-seed impression task after implementation without claiming external feature equivalence.

evidence_sources.title: Deep Rock Galactic: Survivor
evidence_sources.retrieval_method: direct page retrieval — official publisher/developer product page
evidence_sources.caveat: Storefront description only. No implementation access, no play session claimed. Supports publicly stated product structure only.

evidence_sources.title: Deep Rock Galactic
evidence_sources.retrieval_method: direct page retrieval — official publisher/developer product page
evidence_sources.caveat: Storefront description only. Co-op, destructibility, mining fiction are out of scope for Abyssal.

evidence_sources.title: Hades
evidence_sources.retrieval_method: direct page retrieval — official developer product page
evidence_sources.caveat: Storefront description only. Characters, dialogue, mythology, and progression economy are out of scope.

evidence_sources.title: Vampire Survivors
evidence_sources.retrieval_method: direct page retrieval — official developer product page
evidence_sources.caveat: Storefront description only. Setting, economy, and exact progression are not input to Abyssal design.

evidence_sources.title: Left 4 Dead (AI Director / pacing reference)
evidence_sources.retrieval_method: primary developer technical presentation — AIIDE 2009 official Valve CDN PDF
evidence_sources.caveat: Co-op first-person shooter. Numbers are evidence of one shipped implementation, not portable thresholds. Architectural patterns only (Director, pacing state machine, boss/normal separation) are bounded-transferable.

comparator_titles.caveat_global: All five titles are comparator context, not feature specifications. No content, art, code, economy, narrative, or named characters are transferable. Comparison describes publicly stated product-level patterns only.

local_fixture_observations._note: All values below are directly observed from running the pinned test suite. No values are inferred or estimated.

seed_variation_observations.observation_note: Seed 17 selects all-pure alternatives across 3 slots. Seed 18 selects mixed alternatives for slots 1 and 2. Both replays are byte-identical on re-run. Both satisfy all authored slot and composition constraints per test assertion.

critical_hit_observation.observation_note: Seed 1 produces a CRITICAL_HIT at tick 337. baseDamage=900, multiplierBp=20000 → trunc(900×2.0)=1800. Replay from same seed produces identical event. chanceBp=1500 (15%) matches COMMANDER.critProfile.chanceBp.

lore_surprise_observation.seed_23_text: 잠긴 용광로 잔해에서 작은 불씨 하나가 튀어오른다.
lore_surprise_observation.non_combat_confirmed: no enemies, no projectiles, no damage to commander or gate, no reward offer created
lore_surprise_observation.observation_note: rollBp=137 < chanceBp=2500, so outcome is selected. Replay from seed 23 produces identical event. Lore resolution does not alter the seeded wave schedule per test assertion.

comparator_analysis._provenance: RESEARCH_DERIVED — source-file citations only; no direct play sessions
comparator_analysis._caveat: This section maps source-stated patterns to candidate Abyssal features. It is not a feature-equivalence claim. All comparisons are bounded by the cited source text.

comparator_feature_map.feature_candidate: Bounded authored-alternative wave selection via integer seed
comparator_feature_map.abyssal_mechanism: CINDER_SPAN_WAVE_PLAN: 3 slots × 2 authored alternatives each; seed-derived selection with timingJitterTicks=12
comparators_with_analog: E2 Deep Rock Galactic: Survivor (procedural enemy waves per mission)
S1 Left 4 Dead (authored candidate items selected by Director)
comparators_without_direct_analog: E4 Hades (narrative run variety, not wave-slot authored grammar)
E5 Vampire Survivors (time-survival with roguelite upgrades — no authored per-slot grammar stated)
E3 Deep Rock Galactic (procedural cave gen + alien hordes — no per-slot authored alternative grammar stated)
comparator_feature_map.hypothesis: [FALSIFIABLE] The specific combination of: (a) pre-authored named alternatives per wave slot, (b) seed-derived deterministic selection, (c) replay-identity constraint, and (d) non-combat lore event in the same authored grammar — is not publicly stated as a combined mechanism in ≤2 of these 5 comparator titles. This is a structural hypothesis, not a play-experience claim.
comparator_feature_map.falsification_condition: If a comparator's public documentation or postmortem reveals a per-slot authored-alternative grammar with integer-seed replay parity, the absent-in-≤2 count must be revised.

comparator_feature_map.feature_candidate: Caption-first W-01…W-05 world handoff derived only from deterministic stage outcome
comparator_feature_map.abyssal_mechanism: Cutscene strings keyed to stageId; handoff template accepts only allowlisted outcome payload; no run-only skills forwarded
comparators_with_analog: E4 Hades (run-to-run story/upgrade continuity; bosses remember player)
E2 Deep Rock Galactic: Survivor (objective/extraction loop connects to progression)
comparators_without_direct_analog: E3 Deep Rock Galactic (storefront does not describe a between-run caption grammar)
E5 Vampire Survivors (gold for upgrades — cross-run continuity, but no handoff caption grammar stated)
S1 Left 4 Dead (no cross-run world handoff — campaign progression only)
comparator_feature_map.hypothesis: [FALSIFIABLE] A caption-first world-consequence handoff constrained exclusively to deterministic authoritative outcome payload (no renderer/audio authority, no run-skill persistence) is not publicly stated as a mechanism in ≤2 of the 5 comparators.
comparator_feature_map.falsification_condition: If a comparator's postmortem documents an observer-only caption grammar with a strict no-run-state-persistence rule equivalent to P0, the hypothesis must be revised.

comparator_feature_map.feature_candidate: Seed-deterministic lore surprise as non-combat authored table event
comparator_feature_map.abyssal_mechanism: CINDER_SPAN_SURPRISE_TABLE: chanceBp=2500, 2 named text outcomes; resolved at tick 0; cannot damage, spawn enemies, or create rewards
comparators_with_analog: S1 Left 4 Dead (authored event sequences with boss/normal separation — distinct from lore)
comparators_without_direct_analog: E2 Deep Rock Galactic: Survivor (no non-combat authored lore table mechanism stated in storefront)
E3 Deep Rock Galactic (exploration/survival focus — no authored surprise table stated)
E4 Hades (narrative via dialogue system, not a tabular seed-resolved lore event)
E5 Vampire Survivors (minimalistic — no authored lore surprise table stated)
comparator_feature_map.hypothesis: [FALSIFIABLE] A seed-deterministic authored-outcome lore table that fires at tick 0 and is strictly non-combat (no damage, no spawn, no reward) is absent from publicly stated mechanisms in ≥3 of 5 comparators.
comparator_feature_map.falsification_condition: If a comparator's postmortem or documentation describes a seed-keyed non-combat authored text-outcome table, the count must be revised.

novelty_hypothesis.statement: [FALSIFIABLE] At least one of the three candidate features above (bounded per-slot authored-alternative grammar, caption-first deterministic-outcome world handoff, or seed-resolved non-combat lore table) satisfies the condition: absent in ≤2 of the 5 cited comparator titles as measured by their public product descriptions and developer presentations.
novelty_hypothesis.current_status: STRUCTURAL — based on research-derived source text only. Not yet validated by a QA impression session.
falsification_conditions: A cited comparator's documentation reveals the same mechanism combination, reducing absent-in-≤2 count below 1.
A QA impression session scores the implemented feature below 4/5.
The local fixture is found to be incomplete (e.g., the wave-plan grammar covers only 1 slot, or the seed-variation observable is removed in a catalog revision).

blocking_evidence: No QA impression session has been conducted against the Cinder Span fixed-seed slice.
No moderated first-exposure study for objective-direction readability exists.
Wave-plan grammar is 3 slots with 2 alternatives each — not yet a 100-key corpus per the G8-adjacent scorecard targets.
design/novelty-scorecard.md Stage 1 decision gates all remain UNPASSED.
what_is_verified: Fixed-seed determinism: seeds 17 and 18 produce distinct authored-alternative selections; seed 17 replays identically.
Critical hit: seed 1 produces CRITICAL_HIT at tick 337 with correct multiplier semantics; replay identical.
Lore surprise: seed 23 produces LORE_SURPRISE_RESOLVED at tick 0 with rollBp=137 < chanceBp=2500; replay identical; non-combat invariants hold.
All 3 authored test assertions in cinder-span-vertical-slice.test.mjs pass (3/3).

evidence_ledger.description: Authored deterministic test for Cinder Span wave-slot selection, critical hit semantics, and lore surprise.
Immutable authored rules authority; RULES_VERSION=defense-survivor-v1; contains CINDER_SPAN_WAVE_PLAN, CINDER_SPAN_SURPRISE_TABLE, STAGE_TACTICS['cinder-span'], COMMANDER.
Stage/world procedural research containing E2–E5 comparator storefront evidence.
Wave encounter composition research containing S1 (L4D AI Systems) evidence.
PCG map grammar research containing E1–E6 evidence for determinism and variation contracts.
Novelty scorecard with unverified targets and UNPASSED gate decisions.
Gate measurements ledger; G8 declared NOT MEASURED / NOT PASSED.
